summary: LipidMatch has been validated using Q-Exactive orbitrap UHPLC-HRMS/MS data. LipidMatch has been tested and validated using Agilent Q-TOF UHPLC-HRMS/MS experiments. LipidMatch has been tested and validated using Bruker Q-TOF UHPLC-HRMS/MS ex
LipidMatch has been validated using targeted LC-MS/MS approaches.
LipidMatch has been applied for annotation of direct infusion experiments. LipidMatch has been applied for annotation of imaging experiments.
LipidMatch does not currently support Waters files.

LipidMatch can be used with MZmine peak picking software. LipidMatch can be used with XCMS peak picking software. LipidMatch can be used with MS-DIAL peak picking software. LipidMatch can be used with Compound Discoverer peak picking softwa
